message:
feat: harden circuit breaker, refactor cleanup probes, and improve CLI/TUI correctness

Circuit breaker (retry.rs):
- Use CAS loop for half-open probe reservation to prevent concurrent
  callers from all passing through on the same interval boundary
- Clamp threshold minimum to 1 so a zero-threshold breaker is not
  permanently stuck open
- Count one logical operation failure after retries are exhausted
  instead of charging every internal retry attempt
- Return accurate reset_after_secs in half-open rate-limit errors

Server cleanup (cleanup.rs):
- Extract path_modified_within_grace, check_git_listed_activity, and
  check_directory_activity_fallback helpers from monolithic function
- Add directory-aware activity detection: literal directory patterns
  now recurse via git ls-files or walkdir fallback
- Define ACTIVITY_PROBE_PATH_LIMIT constant (5000) shared across probes

CLI (lib.rs, robot.rs):
- Add confirmation prompt to doctor fix with dry-run/yes support
- Extract find_agent_async returning Option instead of error for
  cleaner register-missing flow
- Extract validate_reservation_ttl_seconds for reuse across macro
  and reservation commands
- Simplify thread query: always fetch latest N then reverse, removing
  the conditional order-direction logic; add test for window behavior

Config (config.rs):
- Add normalize_http_path to canonicalize HTTP_PATH env values with
  consistent leading slash and trailing slash

Search (search_response.rs):
- Use tantivy Count collector alongside TopDocs to get accurate total
  hit count independent of fetch limit

TUI (tui_app.rs, agents.rs):
- Preserve agent selection across list refreshes by tracking agent
  name rather than index position
- Track agents_list_gen separately from last_selection to avoid
  unnecessary focused-event recomputation
- Handle None selection in move_selection for correct initial nav
- Initialize last_toast_seq from event ring tail so historical events
  do not replay as toasts on startup
- Remove toast animation tick from visibility loop (handled elsewhere)
- Use idle tick cadence for queued-but-not-visible toasts

Messaging (messaging.rs):
- Disable broadcast messaging entirely: broadcast=true now rejected
  unconditionally to prevent agent spam
- Gate send_message_has_explicit_to_recipients behind #[cfg(test)]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -32,6 +32,7 @@ fastmcp-server.workspace = true
 fastmcp-transport.workspace = true
 chrono.workspace = true
 glob.workspace = true
+walkdir.workspace = true
 sha2.workspace = true
 mcp-agent-mail-core = { path = "../mcp-agent-mail-core" }
 mcp-agent-mail-db = { path = "../mcp-agent-mail-db" }
